{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320174259BCCBE65C56082BC5F3E4"}"},"total":740},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7586226293749072665","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"故事引人入胜，人设完全不蹦，有很多马娘都对男主有意思但作者很循序渐进，每个角色都没有脸谱化，都有自己的感情线，神书一本，希望别被下架。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1766330895,"group_id":"7464221900416240664","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nxku8ejpmUnZE3zaeNzAAMo=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"288506664720356","user_name":"dj董剑嘿嘿"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"288506664720356","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7464221900416240664","book_info":{"abstract":"【动漫走向】+【安利向】+【无系统】+【修罗场】+【热血】+【日常情感】
......
怀揣着某份遗憾，以及难以面对的愧疚，
陆决最终来到了特雷森学园——赛马娘训练中心学园。
......
陆决：“尽情去奔跑吧，不要让出前方的风景。”
无声铃鹿：“陆决先生......”
......
陆决：“肥肥，再多吃你的体重又要增加了。”
特别周：“唔......可是你做的真的太好吃了~还有......陆决桑，请不要叫我肥肥！”
......
陆决：“都给我闭嘴！看比赛就好好看，这么爱喊，要不要我话筒塞你嘴里？！”
“决胜不是在局内，而是在局外？什么小人手段。”
米浴：“陆决君，你也是米浴的英雄。”
